div.div:
THE BOTTOM LINE
MapLibre = visualizer
Valhalla = route calculator
Nominatim = place/address search

div.b: MAPLIBRE IS NOT A ROUTING ENGINE
div.font: It receives already-calculated GeoJSON and renders it. It does not follow roads, calculate driving distance, produce ETA, or generate turn instructions.

div.div:
maplibre-gl-directions sends requests to a configured external routing API. PetaKerja currently uses GeoNavigationManager instead of this plugin.
Plugin configuration ↗

div.font:
Place/address → GeoGateway → Nominatim → coordinates
Browser GPS → current coordinates → MapLibre
GPS coordinate → Nominatim reverse lookup → readable label

Valhalla unavailable or disabled
↓
Haversine straight-line estimate
No ETA · no maneuvers · not navigable
